productDisplayName: Fila Men's Paramount White Navy Shoe
description: CompositionWhite and blue shoes with synthetic upper, cushioned insole, comfort sockliner and phylon soleshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis traditionally shaded white and blue shoe from fila is made especially for those who never compromise on fitness and style. The perforated upper ensures there's ample ventilation for the feet, while the lightweight cushioned footbed and comfort sockliner wraps snugly around the foot, keeping it safe from impact during strenuous fitness sessions. The navy blue contrast bands along the sides ensure a stylish look, while the  radial grooves made of sticky rubber along the forefoot of the outsole ensures a firm grip on hard ground.
